Common questions from the Discord or in-game chat, pooled from across the various pages of the wiki.

=== Lottery ===

{{#cargo_query:table=FAQ
|fields=Questions, Answers
|where=Topic HOLDS "Lottery Machine"
|format=table
}}
<br>
[[File:Wheres the lottery.png|left]]
{{clear}}

===Rocket===
{{#cargo_query:table=FAQ
|fields=Questions, Answers
|where=Topic HOLDS "Domain Wars" OR "Rocket"
|format=table
}}

===Where do I unlock the wormhole?===
Deep within [[Cathay Domain]] (NOT [[Cathay|Cathay Realm]])

===I saw an ad/post/notification about events?===
Check out out [[Weekly Events]] for the latest details, and why newbs don't have them!

===What should I hoard?===
# Lottery Week: Lottery Tickets, various Scrolls
# Wishmaking Week: Wish Coins, Relic Frags, Taichi Fishes
# Offering Week: Offering Speedups, Divine Chests, and Dragon Chests

If you are new, spend whatever you need for Newbie Event!

===Whats the best Relic?===
There is no Best Relic.<br>Orange SSS have the best overall stats, followed by SS, S, AAA, AA, A, Blue, and Green.<br>Pick from what you need.

===How do I get other forms? How do I get Dragon Form?===
# Upgrade your base snail! Maxing out those levels unlock different forms. Visit [[Evolution]] for more info.
# Upgrade all other forms to T5 and purchase it in DNA Evolution Module->Growth Track->DNA Bonus->DNA Value Pack

===When is Daily Reset?===
6am PST. Maintenance is 3:30-6:30 am PST every Friday to prepare for a new Event and patch any bugs.

===Mirror or Lu Bu?===
Most players prefer using the Mirror Realm Trait overall, and the Lu Bu Realm Trait for dominating* Apostles.<br>
<sup>*</sup>Defeating in 2 turns or fewer in Koryeo and Yamato, defeating in 3 turns or fewer in Cathay, Murika, and Britland

===What do I do with the turtle/fast rat/bat?===
Shoot it with incense! Didn't work? Shoot it more! More details at [[Incense]]

===What is Ancient Fossil/Wood===
Resource worth 2k Wood/Stone

===I need B-tads! Where do I get them?===
Where ''don't'' you get them? They are found in so many places, we can't list them all!
